notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Gage Workman.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones grounds into a force out, third baseman Ernie Clement to second baseman Davis Schneider. Wenceel Pérez scores. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd. Dillon Dingler out at 2nd. Jahmai Jones to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Jack Flaherty. Daulton Varsho scores. Jesús Sánchez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Vladimir Guerrero Jr. reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Gage Workman.

notableEvents.label: Myles Straw pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Myles Straw flies out to right fielder Wenceel Pérez.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
